workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates contract
workloads.description: Comparable contract workload for Dawn ResourceTable and immediates APIs with explicit feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P1 Dawn fast-path APIs: DeviceCreateResourceTable, ResourceTable {GetSize/Insert/Update/Remove/Destroy/Release}, and Render/Compute/Bundle SetResourceTable+SetImmediates. When feature-gated unsupported on left, strict comparability accepts unsupported/skipped execution evidence via workload contract override.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable P1 resource-table contract: per-command sequence normalization with deterministic feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier contract
workloads.description: Comparable P0 contract workload for pipeline-layout/render-pass pixel-local-storage chains plus explicit barrier invocation under feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P0 pixel-local-storage API path: pipeline-layout PLS descriptor chain, render-pass PLS storage-attachment chain, and RenderPassEncoderPixelLocalStorageBarrier under non-coherent feature gating. When feature-gated unsupported on left, strict comparability accepts unsupported/skipped execution evidence via workload contract override.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable PLS contract: normalize per diagnostic iteration over 100 repeated non-coherent barrier command sequences with deterministic feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: surface presentation contract
workloads.description: Comparable surface lifecycle proxy benchmark covering create/release surface path on headless adapters.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable proxy contract for surface lifecycle overhead on headless adapters using deterministic create/release semantics with a fixed Dawn baseline filter.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable surface proxy contract: normalize per create/release operation pair.
